findings.title: Magic Number Documentation
findings.description: MAX_ENTRY_POINTS constant lacks explanation for why 5 is chosen
findings.suggested_fix: Add comment explaining the trade-off between completeness and output length
findings.why_it_matters: Magic numbers without explanation create maintenance debt and make it unclear when the value should change

findings.title: Redundant Deep Copies
findings.description: Multiple _propagate_to_context methods perform both in-place mutation AND return new dictionaries
findings.suggested_fix: Consider unifying to either only mutate in-place (for backward compatibility) or only return new dicts
findings.why_it_matters: Dual behavior is confusing and may lead to unexpected side effects or performance issues
evidence: CodebaseAnalyst._propagate_to_context: mutates context['metadata'] then returns new dict
Architect._propagate_to_context: mutates context['patterns'] then returns new dict
TechnicalWriter._propagate_to_context: mutates context keys then returns None

findings.title: Missing Type Hints
findings.description: Some functions lack complete type hints for all parameters
findings.suggested_fix: Add type hints for consistency across the codebase
findings.why_it_matters: Inconsistent type hints make it harder to use static analysis tools and IDE autocomplete

findings.title: pytest.mark.timeout Warning
findings.description: The pytest.mark.timeout marker is not recognized by the installed pytest version
findings.suggested_fix: Install pytest-timeout package or use alternative timeout mechanisms
findings.why_it_matters: Warning clutter and potential test timeout behavior issues

findings.title: Large Test File
findings.description: File is 1600+ lines and covers multiple test classes
findings.suggested_fix: Consider splitting into unit test files and integration test files for better maintainability
findings.why_it_matters: Large files are harder to navigate, review, and maintain
evidence: File contains 54 tests across 4 test classes
Test classes: TestFullAnalysisPipeline, TestAnalysisParserIntegration, TestPyprojectTomlMetadataExtraction, TestAnalysisGeneratorIntegration

recommendations: Recent defensive programming fixes are well-implemented and tested
Minor improvements can be addressed in future refactoring cycles

patterns_verified: Defensive isinstance() checks for type safety
Short-circuit evaluation for None guards on HTTPError.response
